narrative_beat: Overhead mesa com revista, relogio, medalha Nobel — luz divina vertical

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: three ritual objects arranged in a triangle on a dark oak table: an aged parchment-toned magazine, a tarnished brass pocket watch, and a golden Nobel medal, all illuminated by a single vertical beam of divine light
subject.focal_point: the center point where the three objects converge
subject.secondary: Thin wisps of incense smoke rising through the light beam.

environment.location: a dark chamber with the table as the only surface

composition.foreground: three objects in warm golden light

lighting.key_light: single vertical beam of white-gold divine light from directly above
lighting.rim_light: gold reflections on each object surface

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

symbolism.primary: three witnesses to the same event — media, science, prophecy
symbolism.secondary: triangular arrangement as trinity of evidence

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
